title: Activation Policy
description: A schema for defining when a carrier model should be activated, when early exit is allowed, and how escalation decisions are justified in a carrier-swarm inference architecture.

policy_id.description: A unique identifier for the activation policy.

version.description: Version identifier for this activation policy.

description.description: Human-readable description of the activation policy.

default_carrier_activation.description: Default behavior for carrier model activation.

early_exit.description: Rules for ending a mission before carrier activation.

allowed_when.description: Conditions under which a mission may end without carrier activation.

requires_trace_record.description: Whether early exit must still produce a trace record.

minimum_confidence.description: Minimum confidence required for early exit.

maximum_risk_level.description: Maximum risk level allowed for early exit.

carrier_activation_triggers.description: Conditions that require or recommend carrier activation.

condition.description: Condition that may trigger carrier activation.

activation_required.description: Whether this trigger requires carrier activation.

human_review_required.description: Whether this trigger also requires human review.

thresholds.description: Optional numeric thresholds for activation decisions.

decision_required.description: Whether every mission must record an activation or early-exit decision.

justification_required.description: Whether the decision must include a justification.

required_fields.description: Fields required in a decision record.

trace_requirements.description: Trace requirements for activation policy decisions.

log_activation_decision.description: Whether carrier activation decisions must be logged.

log_early_exit_decision.description: Whether early exit decisions must be logged.

log_trigger_conditions.description: Whether trigger conditions must be logged.

log_thresholds.description: Whether threshold values must be logged.

log_human_review_status.description: Whether human review status must be logged.

human_governance.description: Human governance boundary for carrier activation decisions.

human_review_available.description: Whether human review is available for this policy.

human_review_required_when.description: Conditions under which human review is required.
